title: Nanachi Plushie
description: A cute Nanachi plushie for your world from Made in abyss
body:
🧸 Nanachi Plushie

Adds a small decorative **Nanachi** plushie from **Made in Abyss**. It’s just a cute little Plushie you can place anywhere to make your world feel a bit cozier or kawaii.

No fancy powers, no abilities — just a soft friend to keep you company while you build or explore.

💛 Perfect for **fans of Made in Abyss** or anyone who likes adding small cute details to their builds.
